samples.xml_description:
Implement a module of a 64-bit ripple carry adder, which includes several registers to enable the pipeline stages. Clock input Active low reset signal Enable signal for addition operation 64-bit input operand A 64-bit input operand B 65-bit output representing the sum of adda and addb. Output enable signal. The number of pipeline stages. Must be at least 2.

Registers

  • i_en_reg : Input enable signal register.
  • i_en_reg_1 : First pipeline stage register.
  • i_en_reg_2 : Second pipeline stage register.
  • i_en_reg_3 : Third pipeline stage register.
  • i_en_reg_4 : Fourth pipeline stage register.
